CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up;
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by Giselle Casey, CSR#8098. (514)

Jordan Taylor, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, James River Insurance Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Krishna Raghavan.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,512.50
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,030.70
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $1,749.35
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,292.55
Judgment signed in open court.
